identity.name: Stevens Family
identity.tone: Warm, Welcoming, Organized, Playful but Modern

headings.usage: All titles, section headers, and tile labels. Use 'tracking-tight' for larger sizes.

body.usage: Paragraphs, list items, and utility text.

primary.description: Warm Terracotta - used for key actions and active states.

secondary.description: Sage Green - used for success states, calmness, and nature vibes.

background.description: Soft Sand for light mode (warmth), Deep Charcoal for dark mode (depth).

surface.description: Card backgrounds. Must be distinct from the app background.

accent.description: Soft Gold - used for highlights or special notifications.

rules: Use the Soft Sand (#F4F1DE) as the main background in light mode to create warmth. Do not use pure white #FFFFFF for the body background.
In Dark Mode, use Deep Charcoal (#1D1D1F), never pure black.
Text in light mode should be Deep Navy/Grey (#3D405B), not black, to maintain softness.

layout.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers. Mobile-first approach.

navigation.style: Fixed bottom, glassmorphism or solid warm background. Icons + Labels.
navigation.desktop_style: Hidden or converted to side rail (but prioritize mobile view).

icons.style: Rounded stroke, 2px width. Use varied colors for different categories.

structure: Header: Greeting + 'Stevens Family' + Dark Mode Toggle
Tile 1 (Large): Dinner Tonight (Image Background + Text Overlay)

photos.content: Link to Google Drive / Gallery Grid View

dinner.content: Embed Google Doc/Sheet for weekly meal plan

technical_instructions.routing: Use HashRouter from react-router-dom for GitHub Pages compatibility.
technical_instructions.pwa: Ensure manifest.json includes 'Stevens Family' name, correct theme_color (#E07A5F), and background_color (#F4F1DE). Add a service worker registration.
technical_instructions.deployment: Build output must be in 'build' or 'dist' folder. All paths relative.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid warm colors.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44px for kids/fingers.
Dark mode should feel cozy (dimmed lights), not high-contrast neon.
Implement a 'Pull to Refresh' feel or smooth scrolling (lenis not strictly required but nice).
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
